channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Miami WR DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head against Texans
item.description: Miami receiver Grant DuBose was taken off the field on a stretcher after a helmet-to-helmet hit against the Houston Texans on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Man United secures stunning late 2-1 comeback win against Man City
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Amad Diallo struck a 90th-minute winner as Manchester United staged a stunning late comeback to beat Manchester City 2-1 in the Premier League on Sunday. Four-time defending champion City led the Manchester derby 1-0 going into the 88th minute at the Etihad Stadium.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Las Vegas already seems part of the NBA world, which makes expansion decision feel inevitable
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Milwaukee coach Doc Rivers has heard and seen enough. He's convinced there will be an NBA team in Las Vegas. “Yeah, they're going to get it,” Rivers said.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Golden State has landed point guard Dennis Schroder in a trade with the Brooklyn Nets in exchange for injured guard De'Anthony Melton and guard Reece Beekman, the teams announced Sunday. The trade was agreed to on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: LAGUNA NIGUEL, Calif. (AP) — Freddie Freeman’s historic walk-off grand slam ball from Game 1 of the World Series has sold for $1.56 million at auction. The bidding at SCP Auctions went into the late hours of Saturday night, according to a statement from the auction house on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shiffrin recovering after abdominal surgery to clean out deep puncture wound suffered in race crash
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin is recovering after undergoing abdominal surgery on Thursday night to clean out a puncture wound she received in a giant slalom crash two weeks ago.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boise State's Ashton Jeanty feels he 'should've walked away' with Heisman, motivated to get better
item.description: Boise State Broncos running back Ashton Jeanty lamented losing the Heisman Trophy to Colorado Buffaloes' Travis Hunter on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: Freddie Freeman’s historic walk-off grand slam ball from Game 1 of the World Series has sold for $1.56 million at auction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Where to find our complete Week 16 coverage
item.description: Season ends with De La Salle, Pittsburg, Amador Valley falling short, Moreau Catholic winning in state title games.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Bluegrass rivalry enters new era with No. 5 Kentucky and Louisville led by Mark Pope and Pat Kelsey
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky. (AP) — Transition remains for Mark Pope with No. 5 Kentucky and Pat Kelsey with Louisville, growing pains and all.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: AP Pro Football Writer (AP) — Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daniel Penny hailed as a 'hero' alongside Trump and Vance in Army-Navy game suite
item.description: Daniel Penny was hailed as a hero on social media after a viral photo of him alongside Donald Trump and JD Vance at the Army-Navy game circulated Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NC State football coach unimpressed with Bill Belichick question ahead of bowl game
item.description: N.C. State head coach Dave Doeren is preparing for the Wolfpack's bowl game later this month, and the first question he was asked at a press conference was about UNC's new hire.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Marshall opts out of bowl game after dozens of players enter transfer portal: report
item.description: After losing nearly 30 players to the transfer portal, Marshall will reportedly not play in the Independence Bowl, and the NCAA is looking for a replacement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10-man Liverpool draws with Fulham in Premier League but Arsenal fails to take advantage
item.description: Premier League leader Liverpool twice came from behind with 10 men to draw with Fulham 2-2, yet dropped points for the second straight match to give hope to its title rivals on Saturday. Arsenal failed to take advantage.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dosunmu and Giddey lead the Bulls past the struggling Hornets 109-95
item.description: Josh Giddey had 17 points, nine rebounds and seven assists, and the Chicago Bulls beat the struggling Charlotte Hornets 109-95 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers player refused to enter game when called on, Shanahan says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers linebacker De'Vondre Campbell refused to enter the game when Kyle Shanahan attempted to put him in on Thursday night, Shanahan said. Campbell instead went to the locker room. The incident happened in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: With Dybantsa in the house, BYU blasts Fresno State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The highest rated recruit in BYU basketball history was at the Marriott Center Wednesday to watch his future team cruise to victory. AJ Dybantsa was witness to a 28-point drubbing by the Cougars over Fresno State, 95-67.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: FIFA confirms Saudi Arabia as 2034 World Cup host despite human rights concerns
item.description: ZURICH (AP) — Saudi Arabia was officially confirmed Wednesday by FIFA as host of the 2034 World Cup in men’s soccer, giving the oil-rich kingdom its biggest prize yet for massive spending on global sports driven by Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Report: Suzuki in trade talks with Astros for Kyle Tucker
item.description: CHICAGO— The hot stove is heading up for the Chicago Cubs during the 2024 Winter Meetings and the club is reportedly in trade talks for one of the best outfielders in baseball — Kyle Tucker.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Column: The Bears are broken, and it wasn't the Hail Mary that broke them
item.description: Ryan Poles, the Chicago Bears' General Manager, is responsible for the team's player-execution problem, as the team has been outscored 63-13 in the first quarter this year and has a poor talent pool in key positions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs with Bowles: Bucs finally see first place after a tough battle against Raiders
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers won their third straight game, 28-13, over the Las Vegas Raiders and climbed back into first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 7 of the world’s best soccer clubs will play at the Rose Bowl in 2025
item.description: The FIFA Club World Cup 2025 is being hosted in the United States, and one of the venues selected to host group stage matches is the Rose Bowl. Matches at the Rose Bowl are scheduled for June 15, 17, 19, 21, 23 and 25, officials announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42
item.description: Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams had to pile up a veritable mountain of points, yards and time-of-possession advantage early on to give themselves even a chance against the Buffalo Bills' ferocious fourth-quarter rally and a historic six-touchdown performance by Josh Allen.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
